title: The Northern Sanctuary
description: A fortress of stone and steam guards its secrets jealously.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The sanctuary rises from the mountainside, wreathed in steam and shadow.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: That's it? That's where they're holding your father? It's huge!

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: And heavily guarded, Vera. Look—patrol routes, watchtowers. We can't just walk in.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Then we find another way. Da's in there. The moth compass is clear.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: From the rocks, you study the sanctuary. Steam vents line the walls. Machinery clangs in the distance.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: There. A service entrance on the east side. It's used by workers. Maybe we can blend in.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Or we use these steam vents! Climb up through the ventilation system!

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Inside—a maze of corridors and workshops. Construction echoes everywhere.

closing.speaker: Addie
closing.text: Look at these blueprints on the wall. It's... some kind of massive device. Like a clock, but wrong.

closing.speaker: Rainie
closing.text: The Temporal Resonance Device. That's what they called it, right, Vera?

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: A blueprint fragment catches your eye. Father's handwriting: 'Component missing. Core will not stabilize without—' The rest torn away.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Da knew it wouldn't work. He was trying to stop them all along.

choices.text: Take the worker entrance. Disguise ourselves, move slowly, avoid suspicion.
Climb through the vents. Fast, direct, and we can scout from above.

puzzle.title: Threading the Watchful Eye
puzzle.instructions: Rewire the security panel to disable the alarms without being detected.
